codeReview.summary: SessionId migration completed successfully across 11 files. Commit 6072dce migrated session_id fields from Uuid to SessionId newtype. Commit 16c74ad fixed remaining test code that was still using Uuid::new_v4(). All session_id: Uuid patterns have been eliminated (0 matches).

summary: SessionId migration (refactor-03-session-id-fix) passes scrutiny. Commit 6072dce migrated session_id fields across 11 files (swell-core/src/session_compaction.rs, swell-core/src/traits.rs, swell-core/src/transcript.rs, swell-memory/src/blocks.rs, swell-orchestrator/src/agents.rs, swell-orchestrator/src/execution.rs, swell-orchestrator/src/feature_leads.rs, swell-orchestrator/src/idempotent_actions.rs, swell-orchestrator/src/session_hygiene.rs, swell-orchestrator/src/work_graph.rs, swell-orchestrator/tests/mcp_tool_execution.rs). Commit 16c74ad fixed the cross_memory_integration tests that were still using Uuid::new_v4() instead of SessionId::new(). Verification: rg 'session_id:\s*Uuid' returns 0 matches in Rust code. The VAL-NEWTYPE-010 failure (71 matches for session_id: Uuid) is fully resolved.
